harness_fix_disclosure: FIX-1 (pre-execution, disclosed): service.least_busy(backend_list) raises TypeError in qiskit-ibm-runtime 0.48.0 (internal qubits field is list not int). Fixed: replaced with min(eligible, key=lambda b: b.status().pending_jobs). Fix does NOT touch circuit, shots, cases, criteria, or decision procedure. | FIX-2 (pre-execution, disclosed): IBM Quantum API requires ISA-compliant circuits as of March 2024 (H gate rejected on ibm_fez native set). Added transpile(qc, backend=backend, optimization_level=1) before submission. Logical circuit (uniform 8-qubit H + measure_all) is unchanged; only gate representation differs. MANIFEST.sha256 recomputed and recommitted after each fix. Consistent with ARK-451 / WITNESS-1 harness-fix precedent.
